playbook.intent: Brief on a blank canvas -> validated hi-fi prototype + shipped dev handoff package + first sprint supported.
playbook.scope: Product designer takes a greenfield product or new module across 8 weeks. Covers discovery, IA, wireframes, hi-fi, design tokens, a11y baseline, handoff package, and first-sprint support. Done when engineering is in build, the handoff package answers their questions, and at least one design QA pass has run.

success-criteria.criterion: Validated hi-fi prototype with >=3 user-testing sessions completed
Design tokens wired to the build (W3C-compliant)
A11y baseline meets WCAG 2.2 AA on flagship flows
Dev handoff package shipped: spec, tokens, motion, edge cases
First sprint of build supported with at least one design QA pass

stage.name: Problem framing
stage.intent: Convert the brief into a problem worth solving.

tasks.task: Run JTBD interviews to validate the problem
Define success metrics for the product

stage.decision-gate: Advance only if the problem is articulated as a JTBD with measurable success.

stage.name: IA + journeys
stage.intent: Map the spine before drawing pixels.

tasks.task: Identify flagship flows for hi-fi investment

outputs.output: IA map + journey set + flagship-flow shortlist

stage.decision-gate: Advance when IA tests >=80% findability and flagship flows are agreed.

stage.name: Wireframes + heuristics
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when heuristic issues are fixed or accepted.

stage.name: Design tokens + a11y baseline
stage.intent: Wire the visual system before hi-fi sprawl.

tasks.task: Bake a11y baseline (contrast, focus, semantics) into tokens

outputs.output: Token set distributed + a11y baseline documented

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when tokens build clean to code targets and a11y checklist passes.

stage.name: Hi-fi prototype

tasks.task: Build hi-fi screens with tokens applied
Use AI design-assist patterns to accelerate variants

stage.decision-gate: Advance when prototype walks through flagship flows without dead ends.

stage.name: Validate
stage.intent: Real users, real tasks, real signal.

tasks.task: Run quick A/B on a contested decision

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when critical issues are fixed.

stage.name: Handoff package

tasks.task: Compile spec: states, tokens, motion, a11y, edge cases
Run a handoff review with engineering

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when engineering signs off on the package.

stage.name: First sprint support
stage.intent: Stay close during the first build sprint.

tasks.task: Run a daily design-QA pass on PRs
Log learnings for next-cycle handoff template

stage.decision-gate: Done when sprint ends with >=80% design fidelity on flagship flows.

extra.value: [Skipping JTBD discovery -> hi-fi solves the wrong problem, Tokens added after hi-fi -> rework storm, Handoff package skips edge cases -> engineering blocked or guessing]
['Did engineering build without coming back to ask design questions?', 'Does the flagship flow pass WCAG 2.2 AA in production?', 'Are tokens the single source of truth for visual decisions?']

{human: faion get-content zero-to-one-product-design-brief-to-dev-handoff-8-weeks --format md, agent: faion get-content zero-to-one-product-design-brief-to-dev-handoff-8-weeks --format context, json: faion get-content zero-to-one-product-design-brief-to-dev-handoff-8-weeks --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
